quality.rationale: 标准旋量代数分解证明；逻辑链条清晰完整但属纯形式推导，无直接物理观测背景

origin.question:
[文件 1: 1_s21_21.14_b.md]

Problem 21.14. Show that
(b) $\xi_{\mathbf{AB}} = \xi_{(\mathbf{AB})} +  rac{1}{2}\varepsilon_{\mathbf{AB}}\xi_{\mathbf{C}}^{\mathrm{C}}$
where $\xi_{\mathbf{AB}}$ is an arbitrary 2-spinor. [Note: This problem and the two following were suggested by T. Sejnowski.]

## Solution

(b) Writing out the result of part (a) and using the antisymmetry of
$$
\begin{array}{l} \varepsilon_{\mathbf {A B}} \mathrm {g i v e s} \\
\varepsilon_{\mathbf {A B}} \varepsilon_{\mathbf {C D}} + \varepsilon_{\mathbf {A C}} \varepsilon_{\mathbf {D B}} + \varepsilon_{\mathbf {A D}} \varepsilon_{\mathbf {B C}} = 0. \\
\end{array}
$$
Contracting now with $\xi^{\mathbf{CD}}$ gives (watch out for the signs!)
$$
- \varepsilon_{\mathbf {A B}} \xi_{\mathbf {C}}^{\mathbf {C}} + \xi_{\mathbf {A B}} - \xi_{\mathbf {B A}} = 0.
$$
Hence we have
$$
\xi_{\mathbf {A B}} = \xi_{\mathbf {(A B)}} + \xi_{\mathbf {[ A B ]}} = \xi_{\mathbf {(A B)}} + \frac {1}{2} \varepsilon_{\mathbf {A B}} \xi_{\mathbf {C}}^{\mathbf {C}} .
$$
origin.solution:
(b) Writing out the result of part (a) and using the antisymmetry of
$$
\begin{array}{l} \varepsilon_{\mathbf {A B}} \mathrm {g i v e s} \\
\varepsilon_{\mathbf {A B}} \varepsilon_{\mathbf {C D}} + \varepsilon_{\mathbf {A C}} \varepsilon_{\mathbf {D B}} + \varepsilon_{\mathbf {A D}} \varepsilon_{\mathbf {B C}} = 0. \\
\end{array}
$$
Contracting now with $\xi^{\mathbf{CD}}$ gives (watch out for the signs!)
$$
- \varepsilon_{\mathbf {A B}} \xi_{\mathbf {C}}^{\mathbf {C}} + \xi_{\mathbf {A B}} - \xi_{\mathbf {B A}} = 0.
$$
Hence we have
$$
\xi_{\mathbf {A B}} = \xi_{\mathbf {(A B)}} + \xi_{\mathbf {[ A B ]}} = \xi_{\mathbf {(A B)}} + \frac {1}{2} \varepsilon_{\mathbf {A B}} \xi_{\mathbf {C}}^{\mathbf {C}} .
$$
